title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Marathon Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Marathon Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Marathon Realty in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Marathon Realty:
Marathon Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marathon Realty!
